    Deprecated API

    Contents

    • Classes
    • Methods
    • Constructors
    • Deprecated Classes
      Class
      Description
      me.gamercoder215.mobchip.ai.goal.PathfinderFollowBoat
      Superseded by PathfinderFollowPlayerRiddenEntity
    • Deprecated Methods
      Method
      Description
      me.gamercoder215.mobchip.ai.attribute.AttributeInstance.getAttribute()
      Use AttributeInstance.getGenericAttribute() to get the actual Attribute.
      me.gamercoder215.mobchip.ai.goal.CustomPathfinder.getInternalName()
      Internal Use only
      me.gamercoder215.mobchip.ai.goal.PathfinderFollowOwner.canFly()
      no longer exists in the underlying implementation
      me.gamercoder215.mobchip.ai.goal.PathfinderFollowOwner.setCanFly(boolean)
      no longer exists in the underlying implementation
      me.gamercoder215.mobchip.ai.navigation.EntityNavigation.recompute()
      Called automatically by the internal EntityController
      me.gamercoder215.mobchip.ai.schedule.EntityScheduleManager.getCurrentSchedule()
      Schedules no longer exist in 1.21.11+
      me.gamercoder215.mobchip.ai.schedule.EntityScheduleManager.setSchedule(Schedule)
      Schedules no longer exist in 1.21.11+
      me.gamercoder215.mobchip.combat.CombatEntry.getAttacker()
      As of Minecraft 1.20, no longer stored in CombatEntry
      me.gamercoder215.mobchip.combat.CombatEntry.getCombatTime()
      As of Minecraft 1.20, no longer stored in CombatEntry
      me.gamercoder215.mobchip.combat.CombatEntry.getHealthBeforeDamage()
      As of Minecraft 1.20, no longer stored in CombatEntry
      me.gamercoder215.mobchip.EntityBody.getMaxUpStep()
      Exposed in Minecraft 1.20.5 via Attribute#STEP_HEIGHT
      me.gamercoder215.mobchip.EntityBody.interact(Player, EntityBody.InteractionHand)
      Superseded by EntityBody.interact(Player, InteractionHand, Vector)
      me.gamercoder215.mobchip.EntityBody.isInCombat()
      Use EntityCombatTracker.isInCombat() instead.
      me.gamercoder215.mobchip.EntityBody.setMaxUpStep(float)
      Exposed in Minecraft 1.20.5 via Attribute#STEP_HEIGHT
    • Deprecated Constructors
      Constructor
      Description
      me.gamercoder215.mobchip.ai.goal.PathfinderFollowOwner(Tameable, double, float, float, boolean)
      fly no longer exists in the underlying implementation
